tasks.name: Add new cardinality values to schema.prisma

Add new cardinality cases to convert-to-edges.ts

history.notes: Arena exists; skipping research — Arena context available via .claude/.Arena/
Feature initialized — P1 High. E-Commerce domain: all relationship cardinalities + max constraints demo.
PRD created with 8 requirements (5 P0, 2 P1, 1 P2). 14 tables, 7 cardinality types, all 8 data types, all 4 constraint flags. decisions.md created.
PRD review started. Validating requirements against Prisma schema and Zod types.
PRD approved. All requirements well-specified, success metrics measurable, scope well-bounded. 2 minor non-blocking recommendations noted for downstream agents.
Tech spec started. Analyzing Prisma schema, existing seed patterns, Zod schemas, and data access layer.
Tech spec complete. 6 architecture decisions, 2 files to create, 3 files to modify. 4-phase implementation plan. 18 relationships covering all 7 cardinalities.
PM review of tech spec started. Verifying alignment with all 8 PRD requirements.
Tech spec approved. All P0/P1/P2 requirements fully covered. 18 relationships, 7 cardinalities, 8 data types, 4 constraint flags confirmed. No revisions required.
SA review started. Analyzing architecture, security, performance, maintainability, and integration.

Verdict: CONCERNS. 2 high-severity integration issues: (1) convert-to-edges.ts switch statements will break for new cardinality values, (2) Toolbar CARDINALITIES array hardcoded to 4 values. Core architecture is sound. Spec revision required before implementation.

Tech spec revised to address SA review concerns. Added 4 files to modify: convert-to-edges.ts (HIGH-1: marker switch cases), Toolbar.tsx (HIGH-2: CARDINALITIES array), RelationshipEdge.tsx (MED: getCardinalityText), CardinalityMarkerDefs.tsx (new marker IDs). Added Phase 2 for UI integration. Implementation plan now 5 phases.

Re-evaluation verdict: SOUND. All 3 prior issues (2 High, 1 Medium) fully resolved in revised spec. convert-to-edges.ts switch cases added with default fallback, Toolbar CARDINALITIES extended to 7 values, RelationshipEdge getCardinalityText mapped for all new types. Gate passed. Test plan stage unlocked.

Test plan started. Analyzing PRD (8 requirements), tech spec (7 files to modify/create), and existing source code for convert-to-edges.ts, Toolbar.tsx, RelationshipEdge.tsx, CardinalityMarkerDefs.tsx, schema.ts.

Test plan complete. 11 test suites, 82 total test cases (74 P0, 3 P1, 5 P2). 8/8 requirements covered (5 P0 at 100%). 5 new Vitest test files identified. Integration tests documented for seed script verification.
Re-evaluation complete. Verdict: ALIGNED. 27/27 criteria verified and passing. 80 tests pass (0 failures). All 5 unit test files verified in codebase. Stage 11 unlocked.

Code review complete. Verdict: APPROVED. 12 files reviewed (~2200 lines). 0 BLOCKERs, 1 WARNING (MANY_TO_MANY conceptual edge column/table mismatch in seed demo data), 2 SUGGESTIONs. All 8 Greatness Hierarchy tiers passed. 80 tests reported passing. Feature COMPLETE.
